meta.title: Richard Weitz on the Failed Rescue Attempt in Afghanistan
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Political-Military Analysis Richard Weitz joined the BBC on October 12 to discuss the failed rescue attempt that took place in Afghanistan.
